use_cases: Landing page hero with animated ASCII art for creative/tech brands
Developer-focused landing pages with retro computing aesthetic
Portfolio or personal site hero with unique animated visuals
ai_summary: A hero section component that embeds an animated ASCII art canvas from UnicornStudio. The component loads external rendering scripts and applies CSS overrides to manage branding visibility. Features a distinctive monospace ASCII art aesthetic with canvas-based animation, designed for creative, developer-focused, or tech-forward landing pages. The component disables pointer events on embedded content to prevent interaction conflicts.
